item.title: Transport Corporation of India Ltd Surges 12.05% to Day's High of Rs 1015.3 — Outperforms Sector by 8.29 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex managed a modest recovery of 0.35% after a sharp gap down, but Transport Corporation of India Ltd outpaced both the benchmark and its sector with a striking 12.05% gain on 2 Apr 2026. This 8.29 percentage-point outperformance signals a distinctly stock-specific event rather than a broad market rally. Time: 10 minutes ago

item.title: Sanghvi Movers Ltd Surges 7.22% to Day's High of Rs 291.4 — Outperforms Sector by 6.57 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex managed a modest recovery of 0.35% after a sharp gap down, but Sanghvi Movers Ltd outpaced both the benchmark and its sector with a robust 7.22% gain on 2 Apr 2026. This 6.57 percentage-point outperformance signals a distinctly stock-specific rally amid a volatile market backdrop. Time: 10 minutes ago

item.title: Markets Rally, But Vadilal Enterprises Ltd Sinks to 52-Week Low in Stock-Specific Sell-Off
item.description: Despite a broadly recovering market, Vadilal Enterprises Ltd has plunged to a fresh 52-week low of Rs 9,560 on 2 Apr 2026, marking a 4.4% decline intraday and extending its underperformance over the past year with a 16.14% loss compared to the Sensex’s 4.23% fall. Time: 15 minutes ago

item.title: Five Consecutive Losses Push Shervani Industrial Syndicate Ltd to a New 52-Week Low
item.description: For the fifth straight session, Shervani Industrial Syndicate Ltd closed lower, breaching its 52-week low at Rs 309 on 2 Apr 2026, marking a cumulative decline of 8.73% over this period despite an intraday bounce today. Time: 16 minutes ago

item.title: Vishal Mega Mart Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Amid Mixed Market Signals
item.description: Vishal Mega Mart Ltd (VMM) has witnessed a significant surge in open interest in its derivatives segment, with a near 50% increase signalling heightened market activity and shifting investor positioning. Despite the stock’s recent underperformance relative to its sector, the spike in open interest and volume suggests evolving directional bets that merit close attention from traders and investors alike. Time: 26 minutes ago

item.title: Hyundai Motor India Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Amidst Weak Price Momentum
item.description: Hyundai Motor India Ltd has witnessed a significant 35.1% surge in open interest in its derivatives segment, signalling heightened market activity despite the stock’s recent underperformance. This spike in open interest, coupled with rising volumes and sustained investor participation, suggests evolving market positioning and potential directional bets amid a challenging price environment. Time: 26 minutes ago

item.title: Sona BLW Precision Forgings Sees Significant Open Interest Surge Amid Mixed Price Action
item.description: Sona BLW Precision Forgings Ltd (SONACOMS) has witnessed a notable 12.5% increase in open interest in its derivatives segment, signalling heightened market activity and shifting investor positioning. Despite a modest decline in the stock price, the surge in open interest coupled with volume patterns suggests evolving directional bets within the auto components sector. Time: 26 minutes ago

item.title: Amber Enterprises Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Amid Declining Prices
item.description: Amber Enterprises India Ltd has witnessed a significant 23.9% surge in open interest in its derivatives segment, signalling heightened market activity despite the stock’s bearish price movement. This spike in open interest, coupled with falling prices and volume patterns, suggests a complex shift in market positioning that investors should carefully analyse. Time: 26 minutes ago

item.title: Cochin Shipyard Ltd Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Amid Mixed Market Signals
item.description: Cochin Shipyard Ltd (COCHINSHIP) witnessed a significant 32.08% surge in open interest in its derivatives segment on 2 April 2026, signalling heightened market activity and shifting investor positioning. Despite this, the stock faced downward pressure, closing with a 2.71% loss, reflecting a complex interplay between rising speculative interest and bearish sentiment in the Aerospace & Defense mid-cap. Time: 26 minutes ago

item.title: Nippon Life India Asset Management Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Amid Market Volatility
item.description: Nippon Life India Asset Management Ltd (NAM-INDIA) has witnessed a significant surge in open interest in its derivatives segment, signalling heightened market activity and shifting investor positioning. Despite a challenging day marked by a 4.42% decline in the stock price, the sharp 53.3% increase in open interest underscores growing speculative interest and potential directional bets in this mid-cap capital markets player. Time: 26 minutes ago

item.title: RBL Bank Ltd Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Amid Mixed Market Signals
item.description: RBL Bank Ltd has witnessed a notable 11.25% increase in open interest in its derivatives segment, signalling heightened market activity and evolving investor positioning. Despite this surge, the stock underperformed its sector and broader indices, reflecting a complex interplay of bullish and bearish sentiments among traders. Time: 26 minutes ago

item.title: Page Industries Ltd Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Amid Bullish Momentum
item.description: Page Industries Ltd (PAGEIND), a key player in the Garments & Apparels sector, has witnessed a significant surge in open interest (OI) in its derivatives segment, signalling heightened market activity and potential directional bets. The stock outperformed its sector peers and the broader market, reflecting renewed investor confidence amid evolving market dynamics. Time: 26 minutes ago

item.title: Adani Power Sees Sharp Surge in Open Interest Amid Rising Market Momentum
item.description: Adani Power Ltd has witnessed a significant surge in open interest (OI) in its derivatives segment, with a 52.63% increase to 5,823 contracts from the previous 3,815. This sharp rise, coupled with robust volume and improving price trends, suggests a notable shift in market positioning and potential directional bets by investors amid a backdrop of rising investor participation and strong technical momentum. Time: 26 minutes ago

item.title: Stallion India Fluorochemicals Ltd Locks at Upper Circuit With 5% Gain — Buyers Queue, Sellers Absent
item.description: At Rs 112.32, the buying was done — not because demand dried up, but because the exchange wouldn't let the stock go any higher. Stallion India Fluorochemicals Ltd locked at its upper circuit of 4.99% on 2 Apr 2026, with buyers queuing and no sellers willing to part with shares. Time: 26 minutes ago

item.title: Godfrey Phillips India Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Amid Weak Price Action
item.description: Godfrey Phillips India Ltd. has witnessed a striking 154.8% surge in open interest in its derivatives segment, signalling heightened market activity despite the stock’s underperformance and proximity to its 52-week low. This sudden spike in open interest, coupled with subdued price movement and falling investor participation, suggests a complex repositioning by traders that warrants close attention. Time: 26 minutes ago

item.title: Supreme Industries Ltd Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Amid Volatile Trading
item.description: Supreme Industries Ltd has witnessed a notable surge in open interest in its derivatives segment, signalling heightened market activity despite the stock’s recent downward trajectory. The 12.9% increase in open interest, coupled with elevated volumes and persistent volatility, reflects shifting market positioning and potential directional bets among traders. Time: 26 minutes ago

item.title: Karnika Industries Ltd Locks at Upper Circuit With 4.96% Gain — Buyers Queue, Sellers Absent
item.description: At Rs 116.35, the buying was done — not because demand dried up, but because the exchange wouldn't let the stock go any higher. Karnika Industries Ltd locked at its upper circuit of 4.96% on 2 Apr 2026, with buyers queuing and no sellers willing to part with shares. Time: 26 minutes ago

item.title: Motilal Oswal Financial Services Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Amid Mixed Market Signals
item.description: Motilal Oswal Financial Services Ltd (MOTILALOFS) has witnessed a notable 10.36% increase in open interest (OI) in its derivatives segment, signalling heightened market activity and shifting investor positioning. This surge comes amid a backdrop of mixed price performance and sectoral weakness, raising questions about the directional bets being placed on this mid-cap capital markets player. Time: 26 minutes ago

item.title: Prestige Estates Sees Significant Open Interest Surge Amid Bearish Price Action
item.description: Prestige Estates Projects Ltd has witnessed a notable 10.16% increase in open interest in its derivatives segment, signalling heightened market activity and shifting investor positioning. Despite this surge, the stock underperformed its sector and broader indices, reflecting a cautious or bearish sentiment among traders. Time: 26 minutes ago

item.title: Global Surfaces Ltd Locks at Upper Circuit With 5% Gain — Buyers Queue, Sellers Absent
item.description: At Rs 48.90, the buying was done — not because demand dried up, but because the exchange wouldn't let the stock go any higher. Global Surfaces Ltd locked at its upper circuit of 5% on 2 Apr 2026, with buyers queuing and no sellers willing to part with shares. Time: 26 minutes ago
